# Veluc Wellness Blog

> Real wellness tips and digital health guides for African women. Based in Nigeria.

Veluc Wellness Blog is a Nigerian health platform focused on postpartum wellness for African mothers. Our flagship product is the 21-Day Postpartum Belly Flatten Guide — a food timing method that helps Nigerian mothers lose 7–15kg after childbirth without giving up rice, swallow, eba, or their favourite foods.

## About

The guide was created by Chioma, a 34-year-old Lagos mother of two, based on a method taught to her by Mama Rose — a retired Nigerian midwife with 35 years of experience who delivered over 2,000 babies. The method centres on food timing (not restriction), avoiding inflammatory food combinations common in Nigerian cooking, and a two-ingredient nighttime belly reset drink.

## Key Facts

- **Product**: The 21-Day Postpartum Belly Flatten Guide
- **Price**: ₦9,800 (approximately $8 USD) — one-time payment
- **Guarantee**: 30-day money-back guarantee
- **Results**: 247 Nigerian mothers tested; average 4–7kg lost in 21 days
- **Safe for**: Breastfeeding mothers (no calorie restriction, no supplements)
- **No gym required**: Core method is food timing only
- **Nigerian foods allowed**: Rice, eba, swallow, ofe onugbu, egusi, fried plantain

## Core Method (Food Timing)

1. Eat carbohydrates inside your natural fat-burning window (morning/midday)
2. Avoid the 3 common Nigerian food combinations that silently cause gut inflammation
3. Drink Mama Rose's Nighttime Belly Reset Drink (two common Nigerian ingredients) before bed
4. Follow the 21-Day Nigerian Meal Plan — no foods removed, only timing and combinations adjusted
5. Optional: 10-minute at-home morning activation routine (no equipment needed)

## Why It Works

After childbirth, cortisol stays elevated for months. Starvation diets raise cortisol further, signalling the body to store fat in the belly — which is why dieting alone fails for postpartum mothers. The food timing method works WITH postpartum hormones instead of against them.

## Bonus Platform

Buyers receive free access to an interactive web platform (veluc.online/tools) with:
- 21-Day Daily Guide (open each morning)
- Progress Tracker (weight + waist)
- Habit Grid (5 core daily habits)
- Confidence Journal
- Food Swap Guide, Shopping List, Drink Recipes, Workout Guide, and more
